description_long: This kiosk features a compact, two-level structure with a prominent flat, overhanging roof that provides shade and weather protection. The main body is constructed from a gray material, likely concrete or composite panels, with a white trim outlining the roof and the edge of the upper platform. A wooden staircase with a matching wooden railing leads up to the elevated service area, which is partially enclosed by a glass or transparent barrier. The kiosk sits on a square, light tan platform that resembles tiled or patterned pavement, suggesting it is designed for outdoor urban placement. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-level kiosk with a flat overhanging roof, gray body, white trim, and a wooden staircase leading to an elevated service area. The structure sits on a light tan platform, suitable for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden staircase, railing, and the main entrance to the elevated service area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the overhanging roof and the narrow profile of the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back enclosure and the continuation of the white trim and gray body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the staircase from a different angle and the open space beneath the upper platform.
attribute_roof_design: flat, wide overhanging roof with white trim, no visible skylights or decorative elements
